ingredientsDesc: Clindamycin Hydrochloride is the hydrated hydrochloride salt of clindamycin, a substance producd by the chlorinatioon of lincomycin. It has a potency equivalent to not less than 800ug of clindamycin (C18H33ClN2O5S) per mg.
